allow:
Bash(.env << 'EOF'
# Development Environment Configuration

ENV=development

APP_NAME=WirelessAgent Backend
APP_VERSION=1.0.0
DEBUG=true
LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG
LOG_FORMAT=console

HOST=0.0.0.0
PORT=8000
WORKERS=1

CORS_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3000,http://localhost:8080
CORS_ALLOW_CREDENTIALS=true
CORS_ALLOW_METHODS=GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS
CORS_ALLOW_HEADERS=Content-Type,Authorization

LLM_API_KEY=
LLM_BASE_URL=https://api.deepseek.com
LLM_MODEL=deepseek-chat
LLM_TEMPERATURE=0.0

KNOWLEDGE_BASE_PATH=./with_knowledge_base/Intent_Understand.txt
RAY_TRACING_DATA_PATH=./ray_tracing_results.csv

EMBB_TOTAL_CAPACITY=90
URLLC_TOTAL_CAPACITY=30
MMTC_TOTAL_CAPACITY=10
EOF)
